# Indie Product Template

Fill in the fields below and paste this into the working session to save the product to the database.
Leave a field blank or write `null` if it doesn't apply.
Note: `is_own_product` is always `true` for indie products.

---

## Core Info

**title:**
**short_description:** *(max 500 chars — shown on cards and listings)*

**description:** *(supports Markdown — full product overview, shown at top of product page)*
```
[write description here]
```

**project_date:** *(YYYY-MM-DD — launch date or first release)*
**status:** *(completed | in_progress | on_hold)*
**category:** *(exact category name, e.g. SaaS, Tool, Chrome Extension)*
**tags:** *(comma-separated, e.g. Laravel, React, MySQL)*

---

## Links

**project_url:** *(live product URL — also used as default CTA target)*
**github_url:** *(if open source)*

---

## Display

**is_featured:** *(true | false)*
**is_published:** *(true | false)*
**sort_order:** *(integer, lower = appears first, default 0)*
**color_primary:** *(hex, e.g. #41EAD4)*
**color_secondary:** *(hex, e.g. #FF6B35)*

---

## Technologies

*(One per line)*
```
Laravel
Vue.js
MySQL
```

---

## Metrics

**primary_metric_value:** *(e.g. 500+, 4.9★, Free — the big headline number)*
**primary_metric_label:** *(e.g. Users, Rating, Pricing)*

Additional metrics *(name: value pairs, one per line)*:
```
Active Users: 500+
Rating: 4.9/5
Uptime: 99.9%
```

---

## Case Study / Story

**role:** *(e.g. Solo Founder, Lead Developer)*
**duration:** *(e.g. Built in 3 months)*

**challenge:** *(what problem does this product solve?)*
```
[write here]
```

**solution:** *(how does the product solve it?)*
```
[write here]
```

**results:** *(traction, impact, outcomes)*
```
[write here]
```

---

## Product Page — Features

*(Each feature shown in the Features section of the product page)*

**Feature 1**
- title:
- description:
- icon: *(Heroicon name, e.g. `bolt`, `chart-bar`, `shield-check`, `link`, `clock`)*

**Feature 2**
- title:
- description:
- icon:

**Feature 3**
- title:
- description:
- icon:

*(add more as needed)*

---

## Product Page — How It Works

*(Step-by-step section on the product page)*

**Step 1**
- title:
- description:
- icon: *(Heroicon name)*

**Step 2**
- title:
- description:
- icon:

**Step 3**
- title:
- description:
- icon:

*(add more as needed)*

---

## Product Page — Pricing

*(Leave this whole section blank if the product is free or has no pricing page)*

**Plan 1**
- name: *(e.g. Free, Starter, Pro)*
- price: *(number only, e.g. 0, 9, 29)*
- billing_period: *(e.g. /month, /year, one-time, free)*
- description: *(one-line tagline for the plan)*
- highlighted: *(true | false — marks this as the recommended plan)*
- cta_label: *(e.g. Get Started, Buy Now, Upgrade)*
- cta_url: *(link for this plan's CTA button)*
- features:
  - Feature line 1
  - Feature line 2
  - Feature line 3

**Plan 2**
- name:
- price:
- billing_period:
- description:
- highlighted:
- cta_label:
- cta_url:
- features:
  - Feature line 1
  - Feature line 2

*(add more plans as needed)*

---

## Product Page — FAQ

**Q1**
- question:
- answer:

**Q2**
- question:
- answer:

**Q3**
- question:
- answer:

*(add more as needed)*

---

## Product Page — CTA

**cta_url:** *(main call-to-action link, e.g. signup URL or purchase URL)*
**cta_label:** *(button text, e.g. Get Started Free, Buy Now, Try It Free)*

---

## Images

**featured_image:** *(upload manually via admin portal)*
**screenshots:** *(upload manually via admin portal after creation)*
